<?php /** * PolicyInformation * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * PolicyInformation * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class PolicyInformation { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_SEQUENCE, 'children' => [ 'policyIdentifier' => CertPolicyId::MAP, 'policyQualifiers' => [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_SEQUENCE, 'min' => 0, 'max' => -1, 'optional' => true, 'children' => PolicyQualifierInfo::MAP ] ] ]; }
